titel: Trading of supplementary pension funds will take place from May 8th to May 13th, 2026.
html:
Please ensure you are using a recommended web browser. If this is already the case, please try visiting us again in a few minutes.

May 4, 2026 | News

On Friday afternoon, May 8th, the annual fund trading will begin, including the redemption of fund discounts and withdrawals of the Swedish Pensions Agency's supplementary pension fee. Trading of this month's inheritance gains will also be included.

Purchases of new fund shares will start on Monday, May 11th, and are expected to be completed for most people by Wednesday, May 13th.

Fund exchanges ordered after Thursday, May 7th at 11:59 PM will be processed after the trading period ends, which will occur on May 13th for most users.
tldr: Starting May 8, 2026, a period will begin during which you can change the funds in your supplementary pension plan. Most changes will be implemented by May 13th.
lattlast:
Between May 8th and May 13th, 2026, the Swedish Pensions Agency will open a window for you to manage your funds within your supplementary pension plan. This means that during these days, you can choose to move your money between different investment funds, which are the investments that make up your pension.

The purchase of new funds begins on Monday, May 11th, and will be finalized for most people by Wednesday, May 13th. If you want to make a change, you must submit your request no later than Thursday evening, May 7th.

This is an annual opportunity to adjust how your money is invested. It's important to keep track of the dates if you want to move your money to a different fund than the one you currently have.
